notes: Google Calendar and Google Tasks export folders remain under 00_System.
Calendar and Tasks export pages now show a stable export-folder button before staged rows are loaded.
Opening the export folder no longer depends on the currently staged table, so the page should not refresh and lose rows on the first click.
Duplicate open-file/open-folder controls were removed from the Calendar and Tasks export pages.
Tasklists, Google Calendar exports, Google Tasks exports, and backups remain outside local_app so updates can replace local_app safely.
